system.description:
Level 3. Defensive spells you cast on yourself (Flame Barrier, Frost Shield, and Alacrity) are always cast as if you spent +1 mana on them (ignoring your usual upcasting limit).

Level 7. Defensive spells you cast on yourself cost 1 less mana.

Level 11. The 1st defensive spell you cast on yourself each encounter while Dying is free and does not require a save. The 1st ward you cast on a Dying ally each encounter also grants them +1 action.

Level 15. Whenever you cast a defensive spell, you may select a 2nd creature within Reach to gain its benefits.
